ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Loan Commitments received
ChangeRequest.comment:
~"Status::open" ~"Assignment status::ready for assignment"
# Overview
AE differentiates between off balance items that are:
* financial guarantee received * loans commitments received
However the LDM only distinguishes between Financial guarantee received and Other commitments received:
![image.png](/uploads/548bfafc50d64b97dd0b9407c33d152a/image.png){width=278 height=265}
I suggest we also add loan commitments received in the subtyping.
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli @Maria_Manuel.De_Amaro_Brito_Henriques @Pietro.Ferroni
